_meta.description: World Bank Purchasing-Power-Parity conversion factor for India, used to report a PPP-adjusted BRSR intensity (emissions or energy per unit of PPP-adjusted turnover). Editable in the UI; the consultant should confirm the latest vintage before filing.
_meta.indicator: PA.NUS.PPP — PPP conversion factor, GDP (LCU per international $)
_meta.source: World Bank, World Development Indicators (International Comparison Program), PPP conversion factor, GDP, India, 2024
_meta.vintage_note: Value shown is the 2024 series point (2023 was 20.46). The World Bank revises the series each ICP cycle. Re-verify the current-year figure at the World Bank portal before using it in a filing; the field is editable so you can override it.
